'''dholagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubelike|rubelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubelike|rubelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dholagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholagithi|dholagithi]] || [[word:dholagiji|dholagiji]] || [[word:dholagishi|dholagishi]] || [[word:dholagiki|dholagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholaguthuthu|dholaguthuthu]] || [[word:dholagujuju|dholagujuju]] || [[word:dholagushushu|dholagushushu]] || [[word:dholagukuku|dholagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholaguthu|dholaguthu]] || [[word:dholaguju|dholaguju]] || [[word:dholagushu|dholagushu]] || [[word:dholaguku|dholaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholagufthuf|dholagufthuf]] || [[word:dholagufjuf|dholagufjuf]] || [[word:dholagufshuf|dholagufshuf]] || [[word:dholagufkuf|dholagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholagethe|dholagethe]] || [[word:dholageje|dholageje]] || [[word:dholageshe|dholageshe]] || [[word:dholageke|dholageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholagothotho|dholagothotho]] || [[word:dholagojojo|dholagojojo]] || [[word:dholagoshosho|dholagoshosho]] || [[word:dholagokoko|dholagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholagotho|dholagotho]] || [[word:dholagojo|dholagojo]] || [[word:dholagosho|dholagosho]] || [[word:dholagoko|dholagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholagofthof|dholagofthof]] || [[word:dholagofjof|dholagofjof]] || [[word:dholagofshof|dholagofshof]] || [[word:dholagofkof|dholagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfthĂŻf|dholagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfjĂŻf|dholagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfshĂŻf|dholagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfkĂŻf|dholagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dholagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dholagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dholagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dholagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfthĂŻf|dholagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfjĂŻf|dholagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfshĂŻf|dholagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfkĂŻf|dholagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfthĂŻf|dholagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfjĂŻf|dholagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfshĂŻf|dholagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dholagĂŻfkĂŻf|dholagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dholagĂŠthĂŠ|dholagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dholagĂŠjĂŠ|dholagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dholagĂŠshĂŠ|dholagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dholagĂŠkĂŠ|dholagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dholagathatha|dholagathatha]] || [[word:dholagajaja|dholagajaja]] || [[word:dholagashasha|dholagashasha]] || [[word:dholagakaka|dholagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dholagatha|dholagatha]] || [[word:dholagaja|dholagaja]] || [[word:dholagasha|dholagasha]] || [[word:dholagaka|dholagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dholagafthaf|dholagafthaf]] || [[word:dholagafjaf|dholagafjaf]] || [[word:dholagafshaf|dholagafshaf]] || [[word:dholagafkaf|dholagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dholagasha|dholagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholagshĂ«sha|dholagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholagrosha|dholagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholagmusha|dholagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholagyasha|dholagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholagnkshĂ«sha|godholagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholagnkrosha|godholagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholagnkmusha|godholagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholagnkyasha|godholagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dholalagasha|dholalagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholalagshĂ«sha|dholalagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholalagrosha|dholalagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholalagmusha|dholalagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholalagyasha|dholalagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholalagnkshĂ«sha|godholalagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholalagnkrosha|godholalagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholalagnkmusha|godholalagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholalagnkyasha|godholalagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dhelĂŠgasha|dhelĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dhelĂŠgshĂ«sha|dhelĂŠgshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhelĂŠgrosha|dhelĂŠgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhelĂŠgmusha|dhelĂŠgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhelĂŠgyasha|dhelĂŠgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhelĂŠgnkshĂ«sha|godhelĂŠgnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhelĂŠgnkrosha|godhelĂŠgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhelĂŠgnkmusha|godhelĂŠgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godhelĂŠgnkyasha|godhelĂŠgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dholfagasha|dholfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dholfagshĂ«sha|dholfagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dholfagrosha|dholfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dholfagmusha|dholfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dholfagyasha|dholfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godholfagnkshĂ«sha|godholfagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godholfagnkrosha|godholfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godholfagnkmusha|godholfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godholfagnkyasha|godholfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
